scripts.db:wait: infra/scripts/with-env.sh docker compose exec oracle healthcheck.sh
scripts.db:connect: infra/scripts/with-env.sh docker compose exec oracle bash -c 'sqlplus $APP_USER/$APP_USER_PASSWORD@localhost/${ORACLE_DATABASE:-XEPDB1}'
scripts.db:migrate: infra/scripts/with-env.sh docker compose --profile migrate run --rm flyway migrate
scripts.db:migrate:info: infra/scripts/with-env.sh docker compose --profile migrate run --rm flyway info
scripts.db:migrate:repair: infra/scripts/with-env.sh docker compose --profile migrate run --rm flyway repair
